---
name: Plagiarism report
about: Report suspected unattributed copying or license misuse
title: "plagiarism: "
labels: plagiarism
assignees: sorryorc
---

## Suspected Source

Link to the original repository, file, article, paper, or other source.


## Affected Material

Link to the affected file, issue, pull request, release, package, or copied content.


## Evidence

Explain the overlap and include specific file paths, line references, commit hashes, or package versions where possible.


## License Or Attribution Concern

Describe the missing attribution, incompatible license, or ownership concern.


## Reporter Contact

Optional. Provide a contact method only if you are comfortable being contacted for follow-up.
